title: Building X | Siemens
body: Digital platform Building X Manage the operations of your buildings from one platform. Make data-driven decisions to improve sustainability, operations and performance by optimizing areas such as energy use, tenant comfort and safety, maintenance and security. Request a consultation Join our partner ecosystem Offer services, sell or build new apps — learn how we partner with you to deliver the best customer experience. Learn more What is Building X? Building X is a platform that runs the applications that help you manage building operations. It provides a central foundation of secure, real-time data that supports a wide range of use cases. The applications offered for the Building X platform cover all industries and core building use case categories: Energy and sustainability Safety and security Operations and maintenance + more being developed Explore the applications Building X is now UL Solutions Smart System Verified Platinum for connectivity, cybersecurity and interoperability. Learn more Why Building X? 80% of building costs come from operations. Buildings generate 40% of global emissions and 75% of total emissions come from energy use. Building management must improve to both counteract climate change and improve profitability. It's time: leap into the future with an open, flexible solution. 30% 30% Energy savings Customers are achieving up to 30% in energy savings with Building X due to data-driven energy efficiency optimizations. 10% 10% Net operating income Customers are generating up to 10% more net operating income due to smarter operational workflows and accelerated resolution of issues. 24/7 24/7 Transparency Benefit from 24/7 transparency with unparalleled IT and OT integration across all systems of a building, breaking data silos. all Ready-to-use apps Implement ready to-use apps that are built for core building operations and continuously updated. Use AI and ML capabilities for real-time analytics and forecasting. Customize your apps with flexible visualizations and reporting. Explore applications > all Secure, centralized data Harmonize all data in a central, cloud-based platform backed by Siemens' cybersecurity standards. Onboard data once and use across domains, and perform analysis and actions remotely. Learn more about cybersecurity > all Open APIs Access a complete collection of APIs to develop applications or to integrate your systems with Building X. Our APIs provide functionality for application data access, building data management, user account management and more. Discover our APIs > all Expansive ecosystem Access the expertise of our Siemens Xcelerator ecosystem. Certified partners develop and sell new applications to fit a broad range of building operations use cases, and they also provide services customized to meet your needs. Learn about our partner ecosystem > Explore Building X applications Explore our powerful suite of AI-enabled applications, designed to optimize every aspect of your building operations in any industry. View applications Learn how customers are using Building X Building X customers Discover how your buildings can step into the future. Morgan State University - Smart energy management Morgan State University uses the Building X energy management dashboard to connect 80 field panels, 475 controllers, and 7,500 data point to improve efficiency. H Hotels Collection - Energy efficiency monitoring Connected hotel buildings to monitor and track energy consumption trends of 7 buildings. 11 meters and 63 submeters are connected via Modbus TCP to installed Desigo CC management stations. Wonik Holdings - Remote alarm monitoring With Building X Operations Manager, WONIK remotely monitors 300 alarm points in real time, improving visibility, response times, and overall building operations. NWT Real Estate Sweden- AI-driven comfort optimization Across 56 offices on five floors, NWT used Building X Comfort AI to automate HVAC operations and improve tenant comfort, achieving an average 6.4% monthly energy cost savings. case study PRODEA Investments PRODEA Investments, the largest real estate investment company in Greece with a portfolio of 345 assets, is taking their building sustainability to new heights. Creating sustainable and autonomous buildings Company: PRODEA Investments Siemens Software: Building X Tomorrow's Vision: To leverage technology as an accelerator of sustainability. To achieve an ambitious net-zero emissions target. Read case study Award winning solutions Discover how we're elevating smart buildings. ISO 50001 Building X A certified Energy Data Management System. 2024 Frequently asked questions How do I fully connect my buildings and deploy Building X? Connectivity: Building X is an open platform that is vendor agnostic. To get your data into the platform, we offer holistic software and hardware connectivity solutions, from native cloud-connected Siemens hardware and software building management systems, to hardware and software gateways. You do not need to have Siemens devices installed and collecting your building data. We support several standard protocols so our gateways and building management systems will work with your current installations. Learn more about connectivity . Deployment: Building X is based on AWS. We provide Building X with a hosting service included, so you can get value without any effort or maintenance. Deployment is done by Siemens. Does Building X have true AI capabilities? Yes. Learn more on the buyer's guide page . How is Building X purchased? Building X is a digital building platform. To get started, you buy a subscription to Building X applications or APIs aligned to your target use cases. You do not need to buy all Building X applications. You can start small with a single app and scale as needed. When an app is subscribed to, you gain access to a central launch pad where all can be viewed. Before getting started with these apps, you need to get data flowing from your buildings to the Building X platform. To learn about connectivity options and available device mapping and implementation assistance, visit the buyer's guide . How does Building X fit into Siemens Xcelerator? Siemens Xcelerator is an open digital business platform that enables digital transformation faster and at a larger scale. It is based on four principles: Interoperable: digital thread framework for universal data access Flexible: low-code environment for easy customization of solutions Open: standardized APIs for powerful data analysis As a service: Latest technology on a subscription basis Building X is part of the Siemens Xcelerator portfolio and is developed by Siemens Smart Infrastructure.
